title: New Delhi Hosts International Tourism Fair 2026
summary: The annual International Tourism Fair kicks off in New Delhi, showcasing the latest travel trends and destinations from around the world.

title: Red Fort Light and Sound Show Resumes After Monsoon
summary: The popular light and sound show at the Red Fort resumes operations post-monsoon, offering visitors a spectacular evening experience.

title: New Metro Line Connects Major Tourist Attractions
summary: The newly inaugurated Violet Line of the Delhi Metro now connects key tourist spots including India Gate, Qutub Minar, and Lotus Temple.
